prompt: Refactor the express checkout confirmation function to remove duplicate variable declarations and simplify the logic flow.
Update the checkout form to accept a clientSecret prop and initialize a Stripe payment request.
Update the guest info page to use the new Payment Request ButtonElement for Apple and Google Pay.
Refactor the authentication link to use a tabs layout for a sleeker UI.
Implement explicit PaymentIntent confirmation and handle 3D Secure authentication in the guest payment flow.
Update payment UI to hide all wallet options and set explicit locale for iOS stability.
Configure the payment element to disable all wallet options and show only card payments.
Remove the unused payment gateway configuration options from the guest info page.
Update the test amount calculation in the guest info page to use the actual subtotal instead of a hardcoded value.
Update the test amount calculation to use the actual booking subtotal instead of a hardcoded value.
